heading: Environmental Tobacco Smoke
label: B Environmental Tobacco Smoke
notes: CodificationThis part was, in the original, part C of title X of and has been designated part B of this subchapter for purposes of codification.Pub. L. 103–227Similar provisions relating to environmental tobacco smoke are contained in part C (§ 7181 et seq.) of subchapter IV of chapter 70 of this title.
